allow: Bash(powershell -Command "Get-ChildItem htmlcov -Filter '*.html' | Sort-Object LastWriteTime -Descending | Select-Object -First 25 Name, LastWriteTime")

Bash(powershell -Command "Copy-Item execution/order_manager.py execution/order_manager.py.bak; \(Get-Content execution/order_manager.py\) -replace 'pos.remaining_size_coin \\* sell_pct', 'pos.entry_size_coin * sell_pct' | Set-Content execution/order_manager.py; .venv\\Scripts\\python.exe -m pytest tests/Regression/test_22_known_bugs.py::TestBug02Tp2Sizing tests/Unit/test_order_manager.py::TestBug02PartialTpSizing -v 2>&1 | Select-String -Pattern 'PASSED|FAILED|REGRESSION' | Select-Object -First 10; Move-Item -Force execution/order_manager.py.bak execution/order_manager.py")

Bash(powershell -Command "Copy-Item execution/order_manager.py execution/order_manager.py.bak; \(Get-Content execution/order_manager.py\) -replace 'self\\.exchange\\.market_close\\\(asset\\\)\\s*$', 'self.exchange.market_close\(asset, sz=self.positions[asset].entry_size_coin\)' | Set-Content execution/order_manager.py; .venv\\Scripts\\python.exe -m pytest tests/Regression/test_22_known_bugs.py::TestBug03SlFullClose tests/Unit/test_order_manager.py::TestBug03SlFullClose 2>&1 | Select-String -Pattern 'PASSED|FAILED|REGRESSION:' | Select-Object -First 6; Move-Item -Force execution/order_manager.py.bak execution/order_manager.py")

Bash(powershell -Command "Copy-Item execution/order_manager.py execution/order_manager.py.bak; \(Get-Content execution/order_manager.py\) -replace 'if DRY_RUN:\\s*\\r?\\n\\s*return\\s*\\r?\\n\\s*try:', 'if DRY_RUN or not self.positions: return`n        try:' | Set-Content execution/order_manager.py; .venv\\Scripts\\python.exe -m pytest tests/Regression/test_22_known_bugs.py::TestBug05StartupReconciliation::test_startup_loads_open_positions_from_hl 2>&1 | Select-String -Pattern 'PASSED)

Bash(python -c "import config; print\('SPOT:', config.SPOT['timeframe'], config.SPOT['cutloss_pct']\); print\('DERIV:', config.DERIVATIVE['risk_per_trade_pct']\); print\('Split:', config.STRATEGY_POOL_SPLIT\); print\('Enable deriv:', config.ENABLE_DERIVATIVE_STRATEGY\)")

Bash(python -c "from strategy.base_strategy import TradeSignal, BaseStrategy; sig = TradeSignal\(asset='BTC', price=100.0, timestamp_ms=1, reason='x', indicators_snapshot={}\); print\('TradeSignal default:', sig.strategy_type, sig.leverage, sig.is_long, sig.sl_mode\)")
Bash(python -c "from hyperliquid.info import Info; print\([m for m in dir\(Info\) if not m.startswith\('_'\)]\)")
